$comment: scripts/Route23.asm Route23DefaultScript — the badge checkpoint at cell row 119 needs the THUNDERBADGE to pass north. Each guard checks its badge once (EVENT_PASSED_<badge>_CHECK, gh #178); refused, the MovePlayerDownScript push-back, then the refusal text (matching the retired adapter's order).

then.text:
You can pass here
only if you have
the THUNDERBADGE! Oh! That is the
THUNDERBADGE! OK then! Please,
go right ahead!

else.text:
You can pass here
only if you have
the THUNDERBADGE! You don't have
the THUNDERBADGE yet! You have to have
it to get to
POKéMON LEAGUE!
